results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Changes everything' brushes the banned-hype line but the timing angle is specific and contrarian enough to earn a pause.
rationales.clarity: Each slide owns one idea with a clear label and a single actionable takeaway.
rationales.audience_fit: Post-meal ritual fits a busy 25-year-old's day better than a gym block, though 'healthier aging' skews slightly older in framing.
rationales.novelty: Post-meal walking for blood sugar is a well-circulated idea on health TikTok; the timing-beats-intensity angle adds some freshness but won't feel new to a frequent health-content consumer.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged, voice is plain and direct, CTA ties the habit to the Health Score without cringe or hype.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the ritual framing and the concrete 10-minute cue; share rate moderate because the core idea is familiar.
